top_signals.title: Opening remarks by President von der Leyen at the EU-Mexico Summit
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Mexico City, 22 May 2026 Thank you, President Sheinbaum, for hosting us at the 8th EU-Mexico Summit.
